cases.prompt: Write a one-session read-only loop that checks eight local files once.
effects: hard cap names an enforceable proxy

cases.prompt: Write a resumable batch loop whose external effect may complete before a crash.
effects: claims before ACT with idempotency key

cases.prompt: Write an unattended production loop with a prompt-level denylist only.
effects: requires seeded environment denial and active cancellation

cases.prompt: Design a replayable 20,000-item fan-out with branching and retries.
The runtime exposes no authoritative token or dollar meter.
effects: labels token/$ as observed or TBD

cases.prompt: The verifier says PASS but provides no artifact or evidence reference.
Stable preferences are available and environment facts can be discovered.
The same failure class has repeated during a mutating autonomous run.
effects: updates the tactical rule for the repeated failure class

cases.prompt: A cross-run loop encounters a material mismatch between its plan and observed reality.
effects: makes the deviation record citable by retro

cases.prompt: A mutating autonomous run is ready for a substantial merge or ship decision.
effects: substantial merge/ship requires recorded comprehension or waiver

release_rule: Each effect must be checked from the generated artifact or executed fixture; future-tense promises do not pass. Record skill/eval/fixture/runner hashes and mark mismatches STALE.
